TargetName: Deliver preliminary architectural design for County approval
Statement: DEL-001-01 implements SOW-0010a: deliver preliminary architectural design for County approval.
SourceRef: Datasheet.md > Identification > Scope of Work Reference
EvidenceQuote: Scope of Work Reference: SOW-0010a (R-01, ss3.3.2)
Notes: FACT. Confirmed in decomposition Section 7 (PKG-001) and Scope Ledger. SOW-0010a maps to DEL-001-01.

TargetName: Deliver a code-compliant, fully functional maintenance shop addition
Statement: DEL-001-01 supports OBJ-001: deliver a code-compliant, fully functional maintenance shop addition and associated renovations.
Notes: FACT. Confirmed in decomposition Section 5 and Section 7 (PKG-001, DEL-001-01 row).

TargetName: Produce complete P.Eng.-stamped IFC design documentation across all disciplines
Statement: DEL-001-01 supports OBJ-003: produce complete IFC design documentation; preliminary design must receive County approval first.
Notes: FACT. Confirmed in decomposition Section 5 and Section 7 (PKG-001, DEL-001-01 row).

Statement: Preliminary architectural design shall be informed by the geotechnical investigation; foundation approach held open pending geotech results (D-009, variable-price).
EvidenceQuote: preliminary architectural design shall be informed by... the geotechnical investigation (DEL-008-01)
Notes: FACT. Foundation type is variable-price and depends on geotech results (Decomposition D-009). Also referenced in Datasheet Conditions, Guidance P-4, and Procedure Step 1.3.

Statement: Preliminary architectural design shall be informed by preliminary site survey for building footprint and site orientation confirmation.
EvidenceQuote: acknowledge dependency on... preliminary site survey (DEL-008-02)
Notes: FACT. Survey data needed for site orientation, footprint confirmation, and building placement. Referenced in Datasheet (Attributes, Site Conditions), Guidance C-1, Procedure Step 1.3.

Statement: County approval of DEL-001-01 is required before final design (DEL-001-02 through DEL-001-11) may proceed to IFC production.
EvidenceQuote: submitted to Camrose County for review and approval before the Architect proceeds to final design
Notes: FACT. County approval gate per RFP ss3.3.2. Applies to all final design deliverables DEL-001-02 through DEL-001-11; DEL-001-02 listed as representative lead.

Statement: Preliminary architectural design provides primary spatial framework for coordination with structural preliminary design. Coordination items: crane bay column grid, service pit structure, mezzanine loading, foundation approach.
EvidenceQuote: primary spatial framework against which the structural... preliminary designs are coordinated
Notes: FACT. Architect leads coordination role (Decomposition D-008). Procedure Step 5.1 lists specific structural coordination items. Guidance C-2, C-4, C-5, C-11 elaborate.

Statement: County project team must review and approve the preliminary design before final design proceeds. Approval is an explicit gate per RFP ss3.3.2.
EvidenceQuote: submitted to Camrose County project team for review and approval
Notes: FACT. Explicit approval gate from RFP ss3.3.2 and SOW-0010a. Also referenced in Procedure Steps 7-8 and Guidance P-1.

Statement: RFP document is the primary source for building program and design requirements. Required information input.
EvidenceQuote: RFP and all appendices, including App B
Notes: FACT. RFP is the authoritative program source. Status: document is available per Procedure prerequisites table.

Statement: Preliminary architectural design provides spatial framework for coordination with mechanical preliminary design. Coordination items: welding station exhaust routing, heating system approach.
EvidenceQuote: primary spatial framework against which the... mechanical... preliminary designs are coordinated
Notes: FACT. Procedure Step 5.1 lists welding station exhaust routing as coordination item. Guidance C-6 and C-8 elaborate on mechanical coordination points.

Statement: Preliminary architectural design provides spatial framework for coordination with electrical preliminary design. Coordination items: three-phase power service entry point.
EvidenceQuote: primary spatial framework against which the... electrical... preliminary designs are coordinated
Notes: FACT. Procedure Step 5.1 lists three-phase power service entry as coordination item. REQ-011 requires coordination with electrical discipline.

Statement: Preliminary architectural design provides spatial framework for coordination with civil preliminary design. Coordination items: wash bay/mud sump drainage connection.
EvidenceQuote: primary spatial framework against which the... civil... preliminary designs are coordinated
Notes: FACT. Procedure Step 5.1 lists wash bay and mud sump drainage connection as coordination item. Guidance C-3 elaborates.

Statement: Preliminary architectural design provides spatial framework for coordination with plumbing preliminary design. Coordination items: cistern location/clearances, wash bay drainage.
EvidenceQuote: primary spatial framework against which the... plumbing... preliminary designs are coordinated
Notes: FACT. Procedure Step 5.1 lists cistern location and wash bay drainage as coordination items. REQ-012c requires coordination note with Plumbing Engineer.

Statement: Preliminary architectural design provides spatial framework for coordination with landscape architectural preliminary design.
EvidenceQuote: primary spatial framework against which the... landscape architectural... preliminary designs are coordinated
Notes: FACT. Listed in Guidance Purpose as coordinated discipline. No specific coordination items enumerated in Procedure Step 5.1 for landscape; lower confidence on specific data transfer vs. other disciplines.

Statement: Appendix B conceptual floor plan is the primary spatial reference for the preliminary architectural design layout.
EvidenceQuote: RFP and all appendices, including App B (conceptual floor plan)
Notes: FACT. R-04 is the conceptual floor plan driving the building program layout. Available per Procedure prerequisites table.

Statement: Site maps required for site orientation, expansion area boundaries, and property constraints verification.
Notes: FACT. R-07 available but not yet read in detail per Datasheet and Guidance C-1 notes. Site orientation data TBD.

Statement: Attendance at mandatory site meeting is required before design commences. Failure to attend results in disqualification.
Notes: FACT. R-01 ss3.2 mandates attendance March 3, 2026, 10:00 AM MST. Procedure Step 1.2 details confirmation checklist items to resolve at the meeting.
